semantic sentence of the question link to columns:
who did this team play -> opponent
last game of the season -> date

The question is asking which opponent the team played in the last game of the season. Since there is a "date" column with DateType data, we need to sort the dates from most recent to oldest using the f_sort_column(date) operation with the order "large to small" to determine the last game played.

The last game of the season is found in the row with the latest date. In this case, the latest date is "march 5, 2014" which corresponds to the opponent "kosovo". Therefore, the team played against Kosovo in the last game of this season.

judge_thought: Explanation: The question asks who the team played in the last game of the season. From the original table, the team's games are listed chronologically, with the last game being on March 5, 2014, against Kosovo. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 'kosovo' is correct.
